# CSE 110 — Public Project Repository (Temporarily Private)

---

## Overview

Home of our team's project along with its:

* source code
* test code
* CI/CD pipelines
* manually-curated guidelines & auto-generated documentation for developers
* product releases (both "official" and "dev" variants - using GitHub Releases and the repo itself)
* release reports (for developers)

---

## Users 

### Quickstart

* If you are a returning user:
    1. Please visit the official documentation site for personalized steps.
* If you are a brand new user:
    1. Click on the `out/` folder.
    2. Click on the `release/` folder inside.
    3. Open the `.vsix` file.
    4. Click the "download file" button on that page.
    5. Once downloaded, keep note of the path where it was downloaded onto your machine and open VS Code.
    6. In VS Code, find and click the "Extensions" icon on the left "Activity Bar".
    7. Click the 3-dotted line button in the top right of the "sidebar".
    8. Select "Install from VSIX...".
    9. An extension icon should have appeared in the "Activity Bar". Click on it.
    10. If you see "AIT" written in the top left corner of the new interface in the "Sidebar", you have access!
    11. Check out the "Configuration" and "Usage" tabs of our site to setup and use our product! Enjoy!
